title: Moist Gooey Greek Lamb Keftedes
description: A sweet and savory Greek dish featuring lamb keftedes with a gooey center, seasoned with rice vinegar and bhuna spices, perfect for a high protein meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground lamb, rice vinegar, bhuna spice mix, onion, and garlic, and mix well with your hands or a wooden spoon.
In a small bowl, beat the egg and set aside.
Add the breadcrumbs and feta cheese to the lamb mixture and mix until just combined.
Add the beaten egg to the lamb mixture and mix until the mixture is cohesive but not overmixed.
Use your hands to shape the mixture into small keftedes, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Place the keftedes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each keftede.
Bake the keftedes in the preheated oven for 18 minutes, or until cooked through and lightly browned on the outside.
While the keftedes are baking, prepare the gooey center by heating a little water in a saucepan over low heat.
Once the keftedes are done, remove them from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the keftedes hot with a drizzle of the warm gooey center sauce.
